questions.objective_ref: Identify the three factors that determine whether a decision point requires human sign-off or can safely be left to autonomous AI action.
Apply the Judgment Framework (Q1, Q2, Q3) to a real decision point and translate the answers into a specific checkpoint type.
Distinguish among the three oversight modes (HITL / HOTL / HOOTL) and match each to appropriate use cases.
Evaluate a proposed checkpoint design for a known failure mode (confidence routing that erodes in practice) using the escalation pitfalls framework.
Design a checkpoint matrix — identify what belongs in each column.
Bonus (applied judgment from §7 Real-World Patterns): Re-analysis of the college admissions case study (10.1) through the checkpoint design lens.
